# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template that creates a service account and generates a JSON key file for application authentication. Include the key creation in the template so applications can authenticate immediately. This is for our application services that need GCP API access from outside GCP.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

# Copyright 2018 Google LLC. All rights reserved.
# Use of this source code is governed by an Apache-style
# license that can be found in the LICENSE file.


imports:
- path: google.jinja.text.html
- path: cloudbuild/google_cloud_builder_template.jinja.yaml
  substitutions:
    _VERSION_ID_RELEASE: 2019-11-18

resources:
- name: app-identity-sa
  type: cloudresourcemanager.v1.project
  properties: {
      project_id: $(ref.project)
      serviceAccountIds:
      -
        displayName : "app-sa"
        email       : "<EMAIL>"
    }
- name: sa-key-file
  type: compute.v1.serviceAccountKey
  properties:{
    name: $(self.name)-key.json
    publicKeyType : PGP_KEY
    serviceAccountId : $(ref.app-identity-sa.email)
    reuseV1PublicKey: true
  }
- name: project-info
  type: cloudresourcemanager.v1.projectInfo
  properties:{}
  
outputs:{
  appKeyFilePath: $(location.path.file(self.name)-key.json) 
  serviceAccountEmail: $(ref.app-identity-sa.email) 
}
